Index JUIT Waknaghat Search Login Register x Home About Us About us Message from Management Message from Faculty In-Charge Present Team Past Team Code of Ethics Alumni Services Member Benefits Request Forms Distinguished Alumni Alumni Achievements Alumni Awards Directory News and Updates News & Updates Alumni Stories Events Upcoming Events Past Events Gallery Albums Videos Engage Jobs/Internships Scholarship Contact Us Message from Faculty In-Charge Home About Us Message from Faculty In-Charge About Us Message from Management Message from Faculty In-Charge Present Team Past Team Code of Ethics Message from Faculty In-Charge Warm Greetings from your Alma Mater, the Jaypee University of Information Technology! The newly set up Office of Alumni Affairs is the primary communications link between the JUIT and our alumni. We aim to encourage and foster lifelong alumni participation and commitment. JUIT’s Alumni are its most valuable asset as ambassadors in various communities, mentors to today’s students and financial supporters. Over the next several months and years our goal will be to strengthen the bond between the University and our Alumni; increase participation with our younger Alumni and build relationships with more seasoned/matured/old Alumni. All this requires a team effort and of course will require the assistance of the University administration. We acknowledge our Alumni to be the ambassadors and mascots for the advancement of the University. Thus we encourage our Alumni to participate in various support programs and campus activities and events. Campus events which have always interested our student body, and hence our alumni also, remain our annual fest, 'Le Fiestus'; Murious; JUIT-MUN and a host of other events.... and who can forget the annual Alumni Get-Together at JUIT.... Achieving these goals will require a tremendous team effort, and it will be important to get the support of the University administration, friends of JUIT and of course... The Alumni! Simply by visiting this site, you acknowledge the significance in propelling the University, its faculty, its students and its alumni forward to new heights. Take a moment to peruse our site and learn more about the Alumni Association and its benefits. We are not only your connection to years past, but your link for today and the future... Best Wishes Dr. Saurabh Bansal (Faculty In-Charge, JAC) JUIT Waknaghat About Us All who hail from the JUIT have set out on their own incredible journeys, building a life of success and enriching experiences.
